subcodes.first_line: Glad-tidings be unto thee, O servant, for thy letter hath been presented before God and thy name hath flowed from the tongue of thy true Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فبشری لک یا عبد بما حضر کتابک بین یدی الله و جری اسمک من لسان ربک الصادق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
